reviews.review_description: The devs need to fix bugs and they don't update. Devs if you are reading this, update more so players stay more active ,and also you guys did good on the jumpscares maybe instead of a torch make it a big flashlight because a torch in a lab or facility doesn't make sense. Also 1 more thing is that don't make it dark everywhere. Finally make your own spin on the game not like other games example is the scrap machine that is in lethal ape but keep up the decent work.
wtf is this game it doesn't even load in and there are loud noises in the background but cool music.
THE Game is unplayable and when you lod in the unity logo flashes repeatedly and there are loud noises in the background.
This is my type of horror
